programmes.show_description: Fear the Unknown. A Bigfoot believer who is afraid of the dark, and a tough mom who has never left home, take on the dark and mysterious Mayan jungles of Belize. S2, Ep9
The Swarm. A mountain Mum, filled with a wealth of wilderness knowledge, attempts to survive with a partner who seems to prefer napping to trapping. S2, Ep10

Noland Sign Company. The Dawgs salvage a sign company in Roanoke, Virginia. They salvage metal lettering, copper cupolas, and vintage plumbing. S6, Ep12
St. Agatha's Church Rectory. The team head back to Ellwood City to salvage the rectory of St. Agatha's Catholic Church. The crew find a triple sink, glass blocks and storm door. S6, Ep13
Storm Surge. A violent storm pits safety against ambition. Ken rushes to free the Myrtle before it's destroyed. Kris risks being stranded, and Emily tries to appease nature. S7, Ep5
Second Wind. The Bering Sea battle intensifies as Shawn bets big on a new discovery. The Kellys are forced to find new ground and Emily nearly boils a diver alive. S7, Ep6
Marcus and Linden fear a flat battery could leave them stuck in the outback for days. Plus, Shane and Russell attempt to get their season on track. S5, Ep8
The Asian Unicorn. Wildlife biologist, Forrest Gallante, scours the globe using cutting edge technology on his mission to find species that the world has stopped looking for. S2, Ep7
Landlocked. The ice pack has a chokehold on the opilio grounds and captains across the fleet must make the call to stay or go. Some run, and others stay to battle the elements. S8, Ep13
Fearless Leaders. One of the boats suffers a total blackout while navigating an iceberg minefield. Meanwhile Elliott gets a rude awakening, and a greenhorn learns a deadly lesson. S8, Ep14
Dead Silence. Darrell seeks clues from Cooper's past. His widow reveals many secrets, but a former NASA flight director won't say a word. A big piece is missing in Darrell's mission. S1, Ep2
Hunt For Our Ancient Ancestors. Josh Gates travels the globe to unravel the mystery of humanity's origins. How did we survive to the modern day, and what does it mean for our future? S6, Ep7
Revealing Ancient Ancestors. Josh Gates travels to Africa to find a distant relative and scale dangerous cliffs all to answer one question: Where did humans come from? S6, Ep8
Green Mountain Gurus. The Raneys bring some homesteading mastery to a Vermont couple. Marty creates viable access through dense terrain, while Misty builds an underground garden. S4, Ep10
Over The Concrete Rainbow. The Blacklighters are hit with a double dose of disaster. The Bushmen are blindsided by a government decision to shut down thousands of opal claims. S7, Ep8
Red Tape. In the wake of Government shutdowns, The Bushmen are forced back into their deadly mine. Dan and Renee's impatience could cost them their lives. S7, Ep9
Becoming Captain. A US Coastguard chopper attempts a dangerous rescue as Sean and Josh seek help from above. Edgar takes a major gamble and rejects advice from brother Sig. S14, Ep8
Purgatory. A serious illness forces Keith to hand over the Wizard. Josh fights for the helm despite a bad showing. Meanwhile, major engine trouble threatens Wild Bill's season. S14, Ep9
The Gold And The Glory. Todd's crew races to beat 1,000 ounces and make a profitable final season for Grampa Jack. They are hampered by a heavy snowfall in the forecast. S2, Ep12
Raw Winter. Sig and Keith risk fishing far from land and encounter a gauntlet of Bering Sea weather. Johnathan strategically sets pots near a submarine volcano. S20, Ep12
All or Nothing. A hunter from Louisiana meets a California surfer girl on a deserted island of the Philippines. With very little water to tap into, dehydration soon sets in. S2, Ep11
23 Days. A book-smart but inexperienced survivalist and a rock-climbing wilderness enthusiast take on the savannah of Namibia - but the harsh conditions quickly take a toll. S2, Ep12

Trinity Lutheran Church. The Salvage Dawgs take on an old church in Greencastle. They remove the windows, saving the large bell and executing an idea for a console. S7, Ep1
Esther Ludwig Mansion. The Salvage Dawgs go back to Pennsylvania to save what they can from an old mansion before it gets demolished. They salvage chandeliers and mantles. S7, Ep2
Every Ounce Counts. Shawn works overtime to cover for his exhausted crew. Kris is blindsided by the loss of his lead diver. Meanwhile, Emily jumps in to prevent a fuel spill. S7, Ep7
Closing The Gap. Winter winds force the captains to reassess risk and reward. Shawn's mega-barge extraction worsens, and Ken pushes the Myrtle to the limit on a five-day run. S7, Ep8
A wet plant disaster threatens the Dust Devils' potentially lucrative fine gold find. Plus, the Gold Timers desperately try to turn their season around. S5, Ep9
Southern Rocky Mountain Wolf. The Southern Rocky mountain wolf hasn't been seen since the '40s, but cattle attacks suggest it exists. Forrest treks into the Sierras to find out. S2, Ep8
Release the Beast. Frustrations mount as more ice forces the Time Bandit off their fishing grounds. Meanwhile, the crew of the Northwestern fight to stop their boat from capsizing. S8, Ep15

programmes.show_name: Deadliest Catch: Inside the Catch: Best Brawls
programmes.show_description: Takes a closer look at the feuds and short fuses that make up the best Deadliest Catch conflicts. On a crab boat, sometimes the only way to earn respect is to fight for it.
The Columbus Connection. Darrell visits the Atocha, a valuable shipwreck Cooper recorded 50 years ago. Experts send Darrell to an archive in Spain to hunt down an ancient manifest. S1, Ep3
Mysteries Of Bermuda Triangle. Josh Gates dives into the mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle. He goes to the ocean floor, the skies and space to explore its intriguing disappearances. S6, Ep10
Revealing The Triangle. To conclude his epic investigation, Josh Gates uses cutting-edge technology to investigate the Bermuda Triangle's most infamous shipwreck and lost flights. S6, Ep11
No Place Like Dome. The Raneys help a struggling Idaho family in a cliffside geodesic dome home. Misty builds an innovative garden greenhouse, while Matt finds a dangerous predator. S4, Ep11
Water You Waiting For? With water running critically low at their only wash dam, The Cheals work to restore a second agitator. Slim Pickings battle a bung wall breach. S7, Ep10
Glitch In The Matrix. In the race to meet a rainbow matrix order ahead of the Lightning Ridge Opal Festival, The Misfits bet everything on untested DIY contraptions. S7, Ep11
Winter's Curse. A huge tidal surge threatens Josh and Monte as they chase their bounty deep into an Arctic storm. Meanwhile, Wild Bill hopes to get his broken boat off the dock. S14, Ep10
Blackout. Captain Jake is hit with a ship-wide blackout, and Sean is hit with a mechanical break. Unable to fish, Keith hopes to recruit an unlikely person to save his business. S14, Ep11
Back To Mint Condition. The team tackle a lakeside camp, adding a new deck, wood exterior, and open layout. They must contend with summer heat and huge windows. S15, Ep8
Mountaintop Masterpiece. The guys head to Albertville, Alabama, to build a beautiful log cabin guest house high atop Sand Mountain. S15, Ep8
The Gold Devils move their multi-million-dollar operation in search of big gold. And, new team Vince, Bibi and Murray break ground on their dream lease. S8, Ep2
